name: African Bobotie
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak bread in milk. Squeeze out excess milk, reserving the milk.
2. Combine all ingredients except milk and 1 egg in a large bowl.
3. Pour enough reserved milk into the mixture to make 3/4 cup total.
4. Beat together the remaining milk and eggs.
5. Pour the beaten milk and eggs over the meat mixture.
6. Transfer the mixture to an 11 x 7 inch baking dish.
7. Bake, uncovered, at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 1 hour or until golden brown and firm to the touch.
Makes 6 servings.
